reason: Verified that the browser-use feature successfully opens a browser, navigates to a URL, retrieves the page title, and reports the result back in the chat interface.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent home page showing agent list in sidebar.
Step 2: Clicked on "QA-20260605-020021-sejp" agent in the main content area — Agent page opened successfully showing chat interface and agent configuration options.
Step 3: Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat input field — Message was typed correctly in the textbox.
Step 4: Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully and agent started processing (status changed to "working").
Step 5: Waited for response up to 3 minutes — Response was received within 9 seconds. The agent successfully:
